name: Spirit of the Six Samurai
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>六</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>衆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>御</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>代</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per turn, you can either: Target 1 face-up "Six Samurai" monster you control; equip this card to that target, OR: Unequip this card and Special Summon it in face-up Attack Position. While equipped by this effect, the equipped monster gains 500 ATK and DEF. If the equipped monster destroys an opponent's monster by battle: Draw 1 card. (A monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the equipped monster would be destroyed, destroy this card instead.)
flavor: Once per turn, you can either: Target 1 face-up "Six Samurai" monster you control; equip this card to that target, OR: Unequip this card and Special Summon it in face-up Attack Position. While equipped by this effect, the equipped monster gains 500 ATK and DEF. If the equipped monster destroys an opponent's monster by battle: Draw 1 card. (A monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the equipped monster would be destroyed, destroy this card instead.)

eff_types: Ignition, Ignition-like, Continuous-like, Trigger-like, Condition, Continuous-like
action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
